title: Government Bursaries for Higher Education
text:
Government Bursaries for Higher Education - SupportGoWhere
Government Bursaries for Higher Education
Share link
Provides financial assistance for Singapore Citizen students from lower- and middle-income families studying in MOE-subsidised full-time and part-time Nitec, Higher Nitec, diploma and undergraduate courses at publicly funded post-secondary education institutions.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Bursaries up to $6,300 per annum, depending on the level of study and household income
Medicine and Dentistry undergraduates may receive higher bursaries up to $26,100, based on intake, institution, and household income
Collapse all sections
About this support

Nitec and Higher Nitec students

Fee subsidies and/or bursaries of up to $1,850 per annum.

Diploma students

Bursaries of up to $3,050 per annum

Undergraduate students

Bursaries of up to $6,300 per annum for non-Medicine/Dentistry students

Bursaries of up to $22,200 per annum for NUS Medicine/Dentistry students and $26,100 per annum for NTU Medicine students

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizen

Studying in MOE-subsidised full-time or part-time Nitec, Higher Nitec, diploma and undergraduate courses offered by publicly funded post-secondary education institutions.

Gross monthly household income of up to $12,000 or gross monthly household per capita income of $3,000.

How to apply?

You can approach your child's institution to find out more about the application procedures for the scheme.

Where can I find help?

View more details

MOE Hotline: 68722220

Submit an enquiry

Customer Service Centre 1 North Buona Vista Drive, MOE Building, Podium Block Singapore 138675

Scheme last updated 26 Feb 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
